summary: Comprehensive testing of Mira OS context features and Admin panel member directory. All backend APIs verified working correctly. Admin panel Pet Parents tab loads and shows members with modal opening successfully.

mira_chat_os_context.details: Chat API returns complete os_context with layer_activation, temporal_context, safety_gates, picks_update, proactive_alerts, memory_recall

temporal_context_birthday.details: Mojo's birthday (Feb 14) detected as 2 days away: {'type': 'birthday_upcoming', 'days_until': 2, 'date': 'February 14', 'message': 'Birthday in 2 days!'}

memory_recall.details: Past celebration memory recalled: {'type': 'celebration', 'text': 'Mojo: Planning a trip to Goa in February'}

admin_login.details: Admin login works with credentials aditya/lola4304

member_full_profile_api.details: Full profile endpoint works correctly with pets data

admin_pet_parents_tab.details: Pet Parents tab loads with data-testid='pet-parent-directory', shows 50 members in table

admin_member_modal.details: Clicking member row opens profile console modal with tabs: Account, Membership, Pets & Soul, Health Vault, Tickets, Orders, Paw Rewards, Memories, Activity, Notes

mojo_pet_data.details: Mojo (pet-99a708f1722a) found with birthday 2026-02-14 and chicken allergy

critical_code_review_comments: OS context generation in mira_routes.py correctly handles birthday detection, allergy extraction, and memory recall
Admin MemberDirectory.jsx correctly implements member table with modal profile console
Backend APIs return proper os_context structure with all required fields

success_rate.frontend: Admin panel verified (Pet Parents + Member Modal)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Mira OS context features verified working. Birthday detection shows 2 days (Feb 14), chicken allergy in safety_gates, memory_recall returns past celebration. Admin panel loads member directory with 50 members and modal opens correctly. Browser automation crashes on mira-demo page due to complexity but all backend APIs confirmed working.
